name: Architecture Validation After Write
description: Validate that code changes follow the project architecture after write operations

then.prompt:
Validate that the changes just made follow the Unified Design Studio architecture:
1. Files are in the correct directories (backend/thunderkoli, backend/universalengine, frontend, etc.)
2. Microservices boundaries are respected
3. API Gateway patterns are followed
4. No circular dependencies are introduced
5. Naming conventions are consistent

If architecture is correct, acknowledge briefly. If issues exist, explain and suggest corrections.
